description: Department 312 is a directorate within Iran's Ministry of Intelligence (MOIS/VAJA) responsible for internal security and the running of MOIS external operations and agents in Europe. The unit gained international attention when senior officer [Assadollah Assadi](/people/assadollah-assadi) was identified as the operational planner of the 2018 Villepinte bomb plot against the NCRI/MEK rally in Paris — the first time an Iranian diplomat-intelligence officer was convicted in Europe for directing a terrorist attack on European soil. The directorate is believed to use Iranian diplomatic missions as cover for its officers abroad.

sources.title: Belgium sentences Iranian diplomat to 20 years for bomb plot

editorial_notes: Assadi identified as a Department 312 officer in Belgian/European court proceedings and by Belgian and German intelligence assessments.
